chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1697 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.7308/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 06.11.2025 Mr. Danish Bhatti associate of Mr. Muhammad Ali Napar, Advocate for the Petitioner Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh Ms. Shabana Naheed, Assistant PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
